# Issue #720 EC section verbatim — LLM context centralization

## Exit criteria / Validation

- [ ] **EC-1**: Every dashboard LLM call is assembled in one place. — *Verified by*: `dashboard/scripts/check-llm-context.sh` (Phase 1 task 8) exits 0 on `main`; CI step added to `dashboard-test` job.
- [ ] **EC-2**: Conversation history sent to the LLM preserves prior tool calls and tool results. — *Verified by*: `dashboard/lib/llm-context/__tests__/history.test.ts` → `"replays tool_calls and matching tool result messages"` (Phase 2 task 1).
- [ ] **EC-3**: Free-chat conversations don't exceed the configured token budget regardless of length. — *Verified by*: `dashboard/lib/llm-context/__tests__/history.test.ts` → `"50-turn conversation stays under 30K tokens with summarization"` (Phase 2 task 3).
- [ ] **EC-4**: Summaries are never re-summarized. — *Verified by*: DB CHECK constraint on `conversation_summaries.summary_generation` (Phase 2 task 2) + unit test (Phase 2 task 3).
- [ ] **EC-5**: Every OpenRouter-bound flow sends `cache_control: { type: "ephemeral", ttl: "1h" }` on the stable block. — *Verified by*: `dashboard/lib/llm-provider/__tests__/openrouter.test.ts` → cache marker tests (Phase 3 task 1) + per-flow snapshot tests (Phase 3 task 2).
- [ ] **EC-6**: The CLI provider path (`DASHBOARD_LLM_PROVIDER=cli`) keeps working without caching. — *Verified by*: existing CLI provider tests stay green; new test asserts no `cache_control` markers appear on the CLI path.
- [ ] **EC-7**: Tool catalogs are scoped per flow; out-of-scope tool calls are rejected. — *Verified by*: `dashboard/lib/llm-tools/__tests__/runner.test.ts` → out-of-scope rejection test (Phase 3 task 6).
- [ ] **EC-8**: The 4 WrenAI-backed memory tools call WrenAI's retrieval endpoints and return tag-wrapped results. — *Verified by*: `dashboard/lib/llm-tools/handlers/__tests__/memory.test.ts` → 4 tool tests (Phase 4 task 3).
- [ ] **EC-9**: The 4 Postgres-FTS memory tools use the new GIN indexes and return tag-wrapped results. — *Verified by*: same test file; `EXPLAIN ANALYZE` output captured in PR description showing GIN-index usage.
- [ ] **EC-10**: I can run a free-chat conversation of 25+ turns and ask about a fact discovered with a tool in turn 1 — the agent recalls it correctly. — *Human-only*: requires real LLM + real conversation; — *Evidence*: screen recording in Phase 4 task 7 PR.
- [ ] **EC-11**: I can ask the free-chat agent "¿hicimos un dashboard sobre X?" and it visibly calls `search_dashboards` and replies with matches. — *Human-only*: requires real LLM + populated dashboards; — *Evidence*: screen recording in Phase 4 task 7 PR.
- [ ] **EC-12**: Agent documentation (`AGENTS.md`, `ARCHITECTURE.md`, `docs/skills/llm-context.md`) describes the centralized seam and prevents future drift. — *Verified by*: `D-036` recorded; `npm run build:knowledge` drift guard green; new lint rule from Phase 1 task 8 is in CI.
